hubSubtitle.text: We run the same loop in product:
hardens intake on the same ship bar you verify in CI.
is GEODESIC and ephemeralized—one source for rigging and scores, not hand-maintained duplicate lore.
is the live K₄ mesh and the trust fabric: same constants, same ground truth, same public economics (ethical monetization). Three routes; one ethic.

build.title: Initial Build — intake, subject scope, verify-gated bake

ebc.build: Intake and bake on the same verify chain—not a decoupled mock.
ebc.create: One lab surface, honest rigidity—generate or prove; don’t fork the same truth twice (ephemeralization).
ebc.connect: — live cage and edges: mesh, hubs, and money follow the same published contracts (ethical monetization).
